# Basic Redis server functionality test

# Set aggressive timeout environment
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=3s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=2s
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=1500ms

# Start the Redis server in background
server_command 'go run main.go'

# Wait for server startup
wait 1s

# Test redis_get tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test1", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "redis_get", "arguments": {"key": "test_key"}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Retrieved value'
stdout 'test_key'

# Test redis_set tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test2", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "redis_set", "arguments": {"key": "test_key", "value": "test_value", "ttl": 300}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Set test_key = test_value'
stdout 'TTL: 300s'

# Test redis_delete tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test3", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "redis_delete", "arguments": {"key": "test_key"}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Deleted key: test_key'

# Test redis_exists tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test4", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "redis_exists", "arguments": {"key": "test_key"}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Key test_key exists: true'

# Test redis_keys tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test5", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "redis_keys", "arguments": {"pattern": "*"}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Keys matching'
stdout 'key1, key2'
